summary:
Experienced QA professional with a diverse background in Nonwoven technologies, including Spunbond and Carding Air-
Through Bonding (ATB), as well as perforated poly film manufacturing. Additional expertise in microbiological testing within
distillery and brewery environments, ensuring product safety and compliance with industry standards.
Qualified Internal Auditor for QAKE, with hands-on experience in supplier evaluation for raw materials and packaging
materials. Actively involved in preparing for and supporting audits aligned with international quality and regulatory standards,
Dedicated to maintaining the highest standards in product quality, process optimisation, and regulatory compliance, with a
strong focus on quality assurance and workplace safety across diverse manufacturing environments.
achievements: Certified As ‘‘Quality Star” For the Year 2020-21 In Yanjan New Material Pvt. Ltd., Bhopal.
Awarded For ‘‘Corona Warrior” For the Year 2020-21 In Yanjan New Material Pvt. Ltd., Bhopal.
Certified As a ‘‘QAKE Internal Auditor’’ Trainer in Nanliu Manufacturing India Pvt. Ltd. (July 7 to July 9 2025)
